search_query: do I owe taxes on forgiven debt
combined_text: What You Need to Know About Forgiven Debt and Taxes If you’ve had a tough time paying a debt, like a mortgage or a credit card, you may have wondered what would happen if all or a portion of it was “settled” or forgiven.
